classified_questions.question: What is the unit circle and how is it related to trigonometry?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How can we determine the coordinates of point $P$ on the unit circle that is $240^\circ$ counterclockwise from $(1,0)$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How is the altitude from point $P$ to the $x$-axis helpful in determining the value of $\sin 240^\circ$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How do we know that triangle $POD$ is a 30-60-90 triangle?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What are the lengths of the sides of triangle $POD$ and how are they related to the coordinates of point $P$?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How do we use the lengths of the sides of triangle $POD$ to determine the value of $\sin 240^\circ$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you think of any other angles on the unit circle that can be used as examples to compute trigonometric functions using similar triangles?
classified_questions.label: b
